creator: placente35ict@yahoo.co.jp
text:
This has been actually happening since my pkg installed libreoffice 4.3 (or around.  I had kept using since prior version and updating via pkg ) but recently I noticed 5.0 version is under ports so I installed this version.

The installation seemed OK (showed below message saying that missing shared library libjawt.so  which seems to be related to Java Run Time Environment  so I symbolic linked from lib search path of LibreOffice  from  /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program  to  /usr/local/openjdk7/jre/lib/amd64/libjawt.so  and 2 other shared library also related to JRE - libjvm.so & libmawt.so ) 

----------

===>   Registering installation for libreoffice-5.0.1_1
(libreoffice-5.0.1_1) /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/stage//usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libofficebean.so - required shared library libjawt.so not found
Installing libreoffice-5.0.1_1...

----------

% libreoffice --version             
LibreOffice 5.0.1.2.0 00m0(Build:2)


After above, I run 

% libreoffice 

But there just appear  LibreOffice 5  splash image  and nothing else happens.

(This was same with pkg installed LibreOffice 4.3 environment  - It just showed LibreOffice 4  splash image and nothing else happend.)



I noticed this ↓ report

"Bug 176269 - editors/libreoffice 3.6.5_2 does not start on i386 "
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=176269

and followed how to collect trace info.  It's below.


-----

◯ base env

% freebsd-version -k                    
10.2-RELEASE

% freebsd-version -u                    
10.2-RELEASE-p3



◯ cat /var/db/ports/editors_libreoffice/options    info

% cat /var/db/ports/editors_libreoffice/options
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for libreoffice-4.2.5
_OPTIONS_READ=libreoffice-4.2.5
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=CUPS DEBUG GNOME GTK2 GTK3 JAVA KDE4 MMEDIA PGSQL SDK SYSTRAY TEST VERBOSE WEBDAV
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=CUPS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DEBUG
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GNOME
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=GTK2
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GTK3
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=JAVA
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=KDE4

OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SDK
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SYSTRAY
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=TEST
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=VERBOSE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=WEBDAV
